text: Planning a trip can be just as exciting as the journey itself. I spent weeks researching my destination, reading about local customs and must-see sights. Once I arrived, I was immediately immersed in a new culture. Trying traditional food was a highlight, though I often struggled with language barriers when ordering meals. Despite making mistakes with my pronunciation, locals were patient and friendly. These small challenges made the experience more memorable. Now, the beautiful memories of wandering through busy markets and tasting unfamiliar dishes stay with me. Those travel experiences taught me to appreciate diversity and step out of my comfort zone.
